ItacPersonItem.Notes: According to Russo (1979), Zarattino Castellini delivered the inaugural speech in the Umoristi Academy in 1603, with the title `Orazione sulle barbe`. See also Laura Alemanno (1995). I found his nickname as accademico Filopono in Ripa, Iconologia (1765).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
